prompt_text:
### Demographics: 70-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 19 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after hyperglycemia symptoms (polyuria, polydipsia, weight loss)
Current symptoms: Occasional fatigue and thirst with nocturia; no DKA/HHS signs; no severe hypoglycemia; Despite repeated counseling on insulin need, the patient strongly refuses injections; shared decision was made to intensify oral therapy and reassess within 2-4 weeks.; Mild dyspepsia and bloating

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3a (45-59)
Heart failure: HFrEF (NYHA Class II)
ASCVD: Ischemic stroke or transient ischemic attack history
Simple Steatosis
Body mass index category: Overweight
Diabetic retinopathy
Diabetic neuropathy
Diabetic Retinopathy
Diabetic Peripheral Neuropathy
Diabetic Foot Ulcer / High-Risk Foot
Appendicitis (status post appendectomy)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3a (45-59); HF: HFrEF (NYHA Class II); ASCVD: Ischemic stroke or transient ischemic attack history; MASLD: Simple Steatosis; BMI Category: Overweight
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (maternal grandmother)
- Social history: Current smoker (10 cigarettes/day for 25 years; ~12.5 pack-years); Alcohol 1-2 drinks/month

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Dapagliflozin 10mg once daily; Glimepiride 4mg once daily; Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 78.2 kg; Height 178.3 cm; BMI 24.6 kg/m²; Blood pressure 128/77 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 9.3%; 9 months ago 9.5%; 6 months ago 9.8%; 3 months ago 9.6%; current 10.0%), FPG (12 months ago 262mg/dL; 9 months ago 249mg/dL; 6 months ago 211mg/dL; 3 months ago 268mg/dL; current 300mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 78.9kg; 9 months ago 77.2kg; 6 months ago 75.8kg; 3 months ago 75.7kg; current 78.2kg), Height (12 months ago 178.3cm; 9 months ago 178.3cm; 6 months ago 178.3cm; 3 months ago 178.3cm; current 178.3cm), BMI (12 months ago 25.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 24.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 24.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 24.0kg/m²; current 24.6kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 124mmHg; 9 months ago 124mmHg; 6 months ago 126mmHg; 3 months ago 130mmHg; current 128mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 77mmHg; 9 months ago 77mmHg; 6 months ago 75mmHg; 3 months ago 78mmHg; current 77mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 65U/L; 9 months ago 55U/L; 6 months ago 53U/L; 3 months ago 49U/L; current 59U/L), AST (12 months ago 45U/L; 9 months ago 50U/L; 6 months ago 42U/L; 3 months ago 45U/L; current 46U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.5mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.5mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.5mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.5mg/dL; current 0.4mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 53mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 55mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 51mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 52mL/min/1.73m²; current 52mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 138mg/g; 9 months ago 141mg/g; 6 months ago 200mg/g; 3 months ago 147mg/g; current 216mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 87mg/dL; 9 months ago 85mg/dL; 6 months ago 92mg/dL; 3 months ago 86mg/dL; current 88mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 37mg/dL; 9 months ago 39mg/dL; 6 months ago 39mg/dL; 3 months ago 39mg/dL; current 38mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 183mg/dL; 9 months ago 164mg/dL; 6 months ago 164mg/dL; 3 months ago 164mg/dL; current 173mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 12.0g/dL; 9 months ago 11.2g/dL; 6 months ago 11.9g/dL; 3 months ago 11.2g/dL; current 11.4g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Very poor adherence (estimated <50%); SMBG rarely performed; lifestyle control severely limited. Strong injection refusal is documented; under shared decision-making, the patient accepts oral regimen adjustment with short-interval reassessment.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
